title: Rod Nelson
compiled_truth: Rod Nelson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-05), Rod Nelson sent 30 and received 662 emails, totalling 692 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (16), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (8), [Debbie Brackett](people/debbie-brackett) (6), [William Bradford](people/william-bradford) (6), [Bryan Seyfried](people/bryan-seyfried) (6).
timeline:
